tca8418_create.message0: Create TCA8418 keyboard matrix/GPIO expander variable %1
tca8418_create.tooltip: Create TCA8418 keyboard matrix/GPIO expander object

tca8418_matrix.message0: Set %1 Keyboard Matrix Number of Rows %2 Number of Columns %3
tca8418_matrix.tooltip: Configure the number of rows and columns of the keyboard matrix

tca8418_available.tooltip: Get the number of events available in the FIFO buffer

tca8418_get_event.tooltip: Get a key event from the FIFO buffer

tca8418_flush.tooltip: Clear all events in the FIFO buffer

tca8418_enable_interrupts.tooltip: Enable interrupts for matrix and GPIO pins

tca8418_disable_interrupts.tooltip: Disable interrupts for matrix and GPIO pins

tca8418_when_key_event.tooltip: Execute code when there is a key event

tca8418_current_event.tooltip: Get the automatically saved current key event (only used within the event processing block)

tca8418_get_event_row.tooltip: Extract line number (0-7) from key event

tca8418_get_event_col.tooltip: Extract column number (0-9) from key event

tca8418_get_event_pressed.tooltip: Determine whether it is pressed (true) or released (false) from the key event
